descriptions.description: The 9ml Rectangle bottle with a ground glass applicator brings an apothecary feel to small formats. Perfume oil, essential oil, and concentrated fragrance brands use this for dab-on application. The rectangular shape fits neatly in gift boxes and sample packs.

A 10ml Rectangle bottle with a 13-415 neck for fine mist spray. Perfume and fragrance mist brands choose this for a clean, geometric look. The straight sides make labeling and branding straightforward.
